summary: Spent six months building production AI agents and internal tools inside a Fortune-500 biotech.
achievements: Shipped an always-on AI agent that lives in Microsoft Teams, wiring the Claude SDK to Azure and Databricks so colleagues could chat with company data and trigger real workflows
Rebuilt how the org evaluates and onboards new AI ideas, turning a scattered process into one governed intake path used across business units
Prototyped internal tools on Azure AI, Snowflake, and Copilot Studio that quietly automated the busywork behind several day-to-day processes
Sat between engineering and the business, translating fuzzy "can AI do this?" asks into scoped plans, honest risk calls, and things that actually shipped
